name: kaisei-training-system
description: Kaisei comprehensive fitness training system — carb cycling, sports nutrition, training programming, recovery management, and injury prevention & rehab

displayDescription.en: Based on Kaisei's carb cycling methodology, a full-spectrum fitness team covering training programming, sports nutrition, recovery management and injury prevention & rehab.
displayDescription.zh: 基于凯圣王碳水循环体系，提供增肌减脂训练方案、营养饮食规划、恢复管理与运动损伤防护的综合健身团队。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我设计一个8周碳水循环减脂计划，我体重75kg，体脂22%，每周训练4次
defaultInitPrompt.en: Design an 8-week carb cycling fat loss plan for me: 75kg, 22% body fat, training 4x/week

quickPrompts.en: Design an 8-week carb cycling fat loss plan for me: 75kg, 22% body fat, training 4x/week
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我设计一个8周碳水循环减脂计划，我体重75kg，体脂22%，每周训练4次

quickPrompts.en: I feel very fatigued on a low-carb training day, how should I adjust?
quickPrompts.zh: 我今天低碳日训练感觉很疲劳，应该怎么调整？

quickPrompts.en: My left shoulder clicks and hurts during overhead press, how to assess and fix it?
quickPrompts.zh: 我的左肩在做推举时有弹响和疼痛，怎么评估和修复？

profession.zh: 运动损伤防护与康复专家
